headlines.title: Trump's annual financial disclosure shows more than $580M in crypto-related income
headlines.summary: Trump's 927-page financial disclosure report for 2025 totals more than 900 pages detailing holdings in cryptocurrency and stocks.

headlines.title: Nike results top estimates even as China sales drop 12%; retailer expects $986 million tariff refund
headlines.summary: Nike was expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.

headlines.title: Record chip rally adds $2 trillion in combined value to Micron, Intel and AMD in second quarter
headlines.summary: Wall Street poured into chipmakers not named Nvidia in the second quarter, as the artificial intelligence boom expanded to include more suppliers.

headlines.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike both have best quarter ever as AI threats bolster cyber demand
headlines.summary: The cybersecurity leaders are leaning into identity security, a critical cyber segment, as AI agents outnumber humans

headlines.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
headlines.summary: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.

headlines.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
headlines.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."

headlines.title: Micron's monster post-earnings rally is almost gone. Traders divided on where it goes next
headlines.summary: The maker of memory chips slid to start the week, marking an about-face from its post-earnings surge.

headlines.title: This insurance stock is on an impressive run. How to ride the momentum with less risk
headlines.summary: MetLife (MET) is well-positioned in the life insurance and benefits sector, exhibiting fundamental momentum that the broader market hasn't fully priced in.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for strong long-term growth potential
headlines.summary: Amid volatility in global markets, top analysts can help investors look past near-term noise and pick attractive stocks with long-term potential.

headlines.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
headlines.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

headlines.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
headlines.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.

headlines.title: Trump discloses expanding financial empire, including Apple stock, celebration coins and crypto
headlines.summary: The president’s new annual filing is nearly four times as lengthy as last year’s disclosure and shows crypto income in the hundreds of millions

headlines.title: If LeBron James goes to the Warriors, that team’s roster will be stacked with some of the most expensive players in NBA history
headlines.summary: LeBron James’s agent has told the Los Angeles Lakers that he intends to sign with a new team, according to a new report.

headlines.title: Investors piled into ETFs at a record pace in the first half of 2026. Here’s where their money is flowing.
headlines.summary: Investors have poured money into exchange-traded funds at a rapid pace in the first half of 2026, demonstrating an unrelenting appetite for stocks associated with the AI theme.

headlines.title: Bitcoin ETFs were supposed to make selloffs less painful. That theory is being put to the test.
headlines.summary: Crypto investors had hoped that increased institutional adoption and a crypto-friendly administration could help the largest cryptocurrency avoid the painful cycles it once experienced.

headlines.title: Trump’s energy secretary says global warming is ‘no big deal.’ Meanwhile, a heat emergency is striking the U.S.
headlines.summary: Government scientists warn people to stay indoors this weekend as temperatures in many areas could reach triple digits

headlines.title: Will the Comcast-NBCU spinoff pay off for investors? Here’s what history has to say.
headlines.summary: Comcast says splitting its cable and broadband business from NBCUniversal will unlock value for both businesses — but media spinoffs historically have resulted in mixed outcomes.

Underexposure to preferred themes such as AI / compute infrastructure, small modular reactors / clean energy, and cybersecurity.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~6 share(s) to bring weight under 25%

open_questions: What is the current outlook for META and its impact on the portfolio's performance?
